title: Neural Spike Network Simulation
description: An interactive numerical solver for the Hodgkin-Huxley equations, modeling action potentials and synaptic integration in small cortical circuits.

title: Spatial Transcriptomics Map Renderer
description: A high-performance WebGL-based visualization tool for mapping single-cell RNA expression profiles directly onto tissue slice histology coordinates.

title: Ascent Run Club Logbook
description: A minimal web log and run coordinator designed to track trail schedules, routes, and elevation statistics for the local Pune running community.

title: Modeling Microbial Transport in Microfluidic Flows
description: An agent-based simulation of flagellated bacterial navigation and chemotaxis inside complex fluid networks and porous matrices.

title: Sequence Alignment Kernel in Rust
description: A memory-optimized, SIMD-accelerated implementation of the Smith-Waterman local sequence alignment algorithm.

title: Modeling Synaptic Integration in Cortical Microcircuits
description: Poster session showcasing simulation records on how dendritic filtering influences somatic firing rates in pyramidal neurons.

title: Fluidic Biogeochemical Cycles in Microenvironments
description: Co-authored manuscript exploring how transient microfluidic cycles alter nitrogen fixation rates in biological soil crusts.
